name: Beans Tomatoes Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Garden tomatoes (10 or more, desired amount)
Hot peppers (2 or more, finely chopped)
Fresh corn on the cob (12 ears, if fresh available)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook black beans to your desired preference.
- Rinse the beans well to reduce undigestible sugars and use hot water for best results.
2. Pick 10 or more ripe tomatoes from your garden, along with cilantro and a couple of hot peppers.
- For those without a garden, purchase these items at a local farmers market.
3. Select 12 ears of fresh corn from the farmers market, if available.
4. Gather balsamic vinegar and ground cumin from your cupboard.
5. Clean several potatoes for baking.
6. Cook the corn by steaming for about 1 minute (do not overcook) and remove the cob.
- Chop the tomatoes into large pieces and the hot peppers into small pieces.
- Finely chop the cilantro.
7. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, including cumin if desired and additional red pepper flakes to taste.
- Toss in as much balsamic vinegar as you like.
8. Bake the cleaned potatoes and top them with generous portions of this fresh mixture.
- Add non-fat yogurt for an extra creamy texture (optional).
Note: If time is limited, use canned beans and corn; the dish will still be delicious but not quite as good.
